description_long: This apartment building features a modern, modular design with three main rectangular structures connected by exterior staircases and a raised walkway. The central building is elevated on pillars, providing covered parking space beneath, and is accessible via two prominent staircases leading to a large balcony. The exterior is clad in a reddish-brown material, likely brick or painted concrete, with large windows on the main building and smaller, evenly spaced windows on the detached side structure. The property includes a paved driveway and parking area, with two visible cars, and a separate single-story annex with three windows. The overall layout is open and functional, emphasizing accessibility and outdoor circulation.
description: A modern, modular apartment building with three connected rectangular volumes, exterior staircases, large windows, and a raised central section with covered parking beneath.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the building from above and behind, highlighting the rear annex and the open parking area beneath the main structure.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade with the main entrance staircases, balcony, and visible cars parked below the elevated section.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the side of the building, focusing on the staircases, the car parked outside, and the window arrangement on the annex.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a top-down perspective from the opposite side, emphasizing the flat roofs, the annex, and the overall site layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a regular, symmetrical pattern with large panes on the main building and smaller, evenly spaced windows on the annex. The alignment is mostly horizontal, providing a balanced and modern appearance.
